title: login page — successful login redirects to admin
description: Test that valid credentials log the user in and redirect to /admin.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the username field with 'puczaras'
Fill the password field with 'Zup Paras'
Click the submit/login button
Verify the URL changes to /admin
Verify no error message is visible

title: login page — invalid credentials shows error
description: Test that wrong credentials display an error and keep the user on the login page.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Fill the username field with 'wronguser'
Fill the password field with 'wrongpass'
Click the submit/login button
Verify an error message appears on the page
Verify the user is still on the /login page

title: admin layout — sidebar navigation renders correctly
description: Test that the admin panel sidebar loads with all navigation links after login.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Login with username='puczaras' and password='Zup Paras'
Wait for redirect to /admin
Verify the sidebar or navigation menu is visible
Verify at least one navigation link exists (e.g. Tables, Users, Groups, or Import)
Verify the current user name or role is displayed somewhere in the layout

title: admin tables page — list tables page loads for master
description: Test that the tables list page at /admin/tables loads for master user.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Login with username='puczaras' and password='Zup Paras'
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/admin/tables
Verify the tables list page loads without errors
Verify either a list of tables or an empty state message is shown

title: admin tables create — create table and verify it appears in list
description: Login as pre-seeded admin (testadmin/TestAdmin123!) who has role=admin. Create a table via UI. NOTE: The backend seeds a test admin at startup with username='testadmin' and password='TestAdmin123!'.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Login with username='testadmin' and password='TestAdmin123!'
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/admin/tables
Click the create table button ('Nova Tabela' or similar)
Fill in a unique table name (e.g. 'testtable1')
Add at least 2 columns: one named 'id' of type Integer and one named 'label' of type String
Submit the form
Verify the new table appears in the tables list

title: admin data viewer — CRUD on a dynamic table
description: Login as testadmin (pre-seeded admin). This test is self-contained: first create a table if none exists, then perform CRUD. NOTE: testadmin is pre-seeded with username='testadmin' and password='TestAdmin123!'.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Login with username='testadmin' and password='TestAdmin123!'
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/admin/tables

If the tables list is empty ('Nenhuma tabela criada'), first click 'Nova Tabela', fill table name as 'crudtable', add a column named 'id' (type Integer) and another named 'label' (type String), then submit the form
Click on the first table in the list to open its data viewer
Verify the data viewer page loads
Click the Add Record button
Fill in the form fields and save
Verify the new record appears in the data grid
Click the edit (pencil) icon on the record, change a value and save
Verify the update is reflected
Click the delete (trash) icon on the record
Verify the record is removed

title: admin users page — create and delete moderator
description: Login as testadmin (pre-seeded admin), create and delete a moderator via UI. NOTE: When deleting, a browser confirmation dialog ('Deletar este moderador?') will appear — accept/confirm it.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Login with username='testadmin' and password='TestAdmin123!'
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/admin/users
Verify the users page loads with the moderator creation form visible
Fill in the username field with 'testmod1' and fill in a password field
Click the 'Criar Moderador' button
Verify the new moderator 'testmod1' appears in the moderators list
Click the trash/delete icon button next to 'testmod1'
A browser confirmation dialog will appear — click OK or Accept to confirm the deletion
Verify 'testmod1' is no longer visible in the moderators list (either list is empty or testmod1 is gone)

title: admin groups page — create database group
description: Login as testadmin (pre-seeded admin, role=admin). The create group form is only visible for admin (not master). Create a group via UI.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Login with username='testadmin' and password='TestAdmin123!'
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/admin/groups
Verify the groups page loads
Fill in the group name field with 'TestGroup1'
Fill in the description field with 'Test description'
Click the 'Criar Grupo' button
Verify the new group 'TestGroup1' appears in the list

title: admin import SQL — page loads and UI elements are present
description: Login as testadmin (pre-seeded admin). Verify the SQL import page loads correctly with all expected UI elements. NOTE: This test only verifies the UI renders correctly — it does not perform an actual file upload.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Login with username='testadmin' and password='TestAdmin123!'
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/admin/import/sql
Verify the SQL import page loads without errors
Verify a file upload area or dropzone is visible (e.g. text like 'Arraste ou clique para selecionar um .sql' or a file input)
Verify an analyze or dry-run button is present (e.g. 'Analisar Script' or similar)
Verify no fatal errors or access denied messages are shown

title: public explore page — renders without login
description: Test that the public data explorer page loads without authentication.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/explore without any login
Verify the page loads without redirecting to login
Verify the page title or heading is visible
Verify there is a list of public tables or an empty state message
Verify no fatal errors prevent the page from rendering

title: login page — QR code login flow
description: Test the QR code login flow on the login page. The login page has a 'Logar com QR Code' button that generates a QR code and shows a waiting status indicator.
steps: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
Verify the QR code login button is visible (text 'Logar com QR Code' with a QR icon)
Click the 'Logar com QR Code' button
Verify the page transitions to show a QR code image (canvas element with the QR code)
Verify the instruction text is visible (e.g. 'Escaneie o código com seu celular' or similar)
Verify a waiting/polling status message is shown (e.g. 'Aguardando autorização...' or similar)
Verify a 'Voltar para senha' back button is present on the QR view
